payload.answer: I’m not confident enough to determine which Sam or what relationship/fact should be remembered. Please clarify the Sam note before I save anything.

entity_resolution.reason: The note about Sam is ambiguous, model confidence is low, and cloud escalation is disabled; no durable memory should be committed without clarification.

details: No memory committed because the Sam note is ambiguous and confidence is low.
Cloud escalation is disabled, so clarification is required from the user.

repair_options: Clarify which Sam this refers to.
Provide the exact relationship or fact that should be remembered.
Indicate whether this should update an existing Sam or create a new person record.
